mission.title: cloudevents: AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents
mission.description: AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current cloudevents setup
steps.description:
Verify your cloudevents version:
CloudEvents is a specification — check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)
This feature requires cloudevents as a dependency.

steps.title: Review cloudevents configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant cloudevents configuration:
I am creating Kafka APIs in AsyncAPI. These APIs should have CloudEvents headers.
Now, I was wondering if it would make sense to have an official CloudEvents Trait in AsyncAPI to include these CloudEvents headers.

steps.title: Apply the fix for AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents
steps.description:
Hi ,

Thanks a lot for your reply!
I would like an AsyncAPI v3 trait (I updated the issue to clarify this). So, the inheritance/overwrite problem should not matter here.

With an AsyncAPI trait, I know that you need to define the exact fields and their placement (in binary or structured mode). This
```yaml
components:
  schemas:
    userSignedUpPayload:
      type: object
      allOf:
        - $ref: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cloudevents/spec/v1.0.1/spec.json'
      properties:
        data:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/userSignedUpData'
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hi ,

Thanks a lot for your reply!
I would like an AsyncAPI v3 trait (I updated the issue to clarify this). So, the inheritance/overwrite problem should not matter here.

With an AsyncAPI trait, I know that you need to define the exact fields and their placement (in binary or structured mode). This specification is one of the goals I want to achieve.
codeSnippets:
components:
  schemas:
    userSignedUpPayload:
      type: object
      allOf:
        - $ref: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cloudevents/spec/v1.0.1/spec.json'
      properties:
        data:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/userSignedUpData'

prerequisites.description: CloudEvents is a specification — check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)
